note: Cross-tool substitution matrix: equivalence classes of capability-equal tools with sourced 2026 base pricing, migration friction, and lock-in caveats. A swap is suggested only WITHIN a class (same capability) when a sourced alternative is materially cheaper (>= minMaterialSavingsUsd). Savings use base/plan fees, not measured usage — treat as directional and verify workload fit before switching. Tools that are NOT 1:1 (Postgres vs MongoDB; Redis vs eventually-consistent KV; issue-tracking vs metrics-APM) are deliberately kept in SEPARATE classes and never cross-recommended (R13).

classes.capability: Static / JAMstack site hosting: global CDN for static assets plus a build pipeline, no always-on server. Edge/SSR functions are NOT part of this equivalence and must be migrated separately.

tools.lockIn: Edge Middleware and Serverless/Edge Functions are Vercel-specific; static build output is fully portable.
Netlify Functions/Edge Functions and _redirects syntax are platform-specific; static output is portable.
Static hosting and egress are free; Pages Functions use the Workers runtime if server logic is later needed.

source.what: Cloudflare Pages static hosting + egress free

nonSubstitutes.why: relational vs document model — not a drop-in swap
KV is an eventually-consistent string store; not equivalent for write-heavy or Redis-data-structure workloads
issue-tracking workflow vs metrics-first APM — different capability

sources.what: Cloudflare Pages free static hosting + egress
